# Code of Conduct

## Our Standard

This project expects respectful, direct, and constructive collaboration.

Examples of acceptable behavior:

- giving technical feedback without hostility
- reporting bugs with reproducible detail
- challenging ideas without attacking people
- accepting correction and revising assumptions

Examples of unacceptable behavior:

- harassment, insults, or threats
- discrimination or hate speech
- doxxing or exposing private information
- intentionally disruptive or bad-faith participation

## Enforcement

Project maintainers may remove comments, lock discussions, reject contributions, or ban participants who violate these standards.

## Reporting

For conduct issues, use the private security/contact path described in [SECURITY.md](./SECURITY.md).
